calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Blocked Account Receipt
Off Calendar Apr-24-2007 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Blocked Account Receipt
Off Calendar Apr-10-2007 Continued To Apr-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition To Authorize Distibution Of Insurance Proceeds To Custodian
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Martha Daetwyler (Counsel for Anne Fletcher, Petitioner); Anne Fletcher (Petitioner).

After extensive discussion concerning alternative methods of holding the minor's funds, the Court ordered the funds deposited in a blocked account whereupon release of the funds may be achieved for limited purposes by ex parte application when and if necessary (the Court noting that the custodian should submit a declaration at that time evidencing why she is not able to provide the services ostensibly required from her own funds). Ms. Daetwyler is to prepare the Order.

The Court set the matter for status of the filing of the receipts for the deposit to the blocked account for April 10, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.
